title: pelargonium bivonae
intro: Pelargonium bivonae, also known as the Cape Pelargonium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as an antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory agent, which has been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Pelargonium bivonae include its use in reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and providing relief from digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium bivonae include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made from the plant's leaves and flowers.
